verbal_description: LRDA, midline sided (unilateral), at 1.2 Hz, midline midline with broad field.
LRDA, left sided (bilateral asymmetric), at 1.0 Hz, bilateral frontal (left predominant) with broad field.
LRDA, bilateral sided (unilateral), at 1.6 Hz, bilateral frontal (left predominant) with broad field.
